name: Push-Up
instructions:
1. Setup: Hands under shoulders, fingers spread; feet hip-width; straight line head to heels.
2. Brace: Squeeze glutes and abs; ribs down; neck neutral.
3. Lower: Bend elbows ~45° from torso until chest is 2–5 cm from floor.
4. Press: Drive through palms to full extension without locking harshly.
5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale up.
6. Avoid: Sagging hips, flared elbows, craning neck.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions:
1. Setup: Bench with feet planted; eyes under bar/weights over mid‑chest; scapulae lightly retracted.
2. Grip: Wrists neutral; forearms vertical at bottom.
3. Lower: Control descent to mid‑chest with elbows ~45° from torso.
4. Press: Drive up and slightly back; wrists stacked over elbows.
5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale during press.
6. Avoid: Excessive arch, butt lifting, bouncing off chest.

instructions:

5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale up.
6. Avoid: Sagging hips, flared elbows, craning neck.

6. Avoid: Excessive arch, butt lifting, bouncing off chest.

instructions:

5. Avoid: Kipping (unless intended), chin jutting, rib flare.

name: Close-Grip Push-Up
instructions:
1. Setup: Hands under shoulders, fingers spread; feet hip-width; straight line head to heels.
2. Brace: Squeeze glutes and abs; ribs down; neck neutral.
3. Lower: Bend elbows ~45° from torso until chest is 2–5 cm from floor.
4. Press: Drive through palms to full extension without locking harshly.
5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale up.
6. Avoid: Sagging hips, flared elbows, craning neck.

1. Setup: Bench with feet planted; eyes under bar/weights over mid‑chest; scapulae lightly retracted.
2. Grip: Wrists neutral; forearms vertical at bottom.
3. Lower: Control descent to mid‑chest with elbows ~45° from torso.
4. Press: Drive up and slightly back; wrists stacked over elbows.
5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale during press.
6. Avoid: Excessive arch, butt lifting, bouncing off chest.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions:
1. Setup: Feet shoulder‑width; toes slightly out; brace core; bar/weight secure.
2. Descend: Hips back and down; knees track over toes; chest up.
3. Depth: Thighs parallel or best depth without losing posture.
4. Ascend: Drive through mid‑foot; stand tall without hyperextending.
5. Breathing: Inhale before descent; exhale through sticking point.
6. Avoid: Knees collapsing inward, heels lifting, lumbar rounding.

name: Split Squat
instructions:
1. Setup: Tall stance, feet hip‑width; brace core; hold load as prescribed.
2. Step: Front knee tracks over middle toes; torso tall.
3. Lower: Descend until both knees near 90°.
4. Rise: Drive through front foot; return or alternate sides.
5. Breathing: Inhale down; exhale up.
6. Avoid: Overstriding, valgus knees, torso tipping forward.

6. Avoid: Over‑arching low back, heel distance too far/close.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions:
1. Setup: Feet wider than hips; hinge; lats tight on bell.
2. Hike: Snap bell back between thighs with neutral spine.
3. Drive: Explosively extend hips to float to chest height.
4. Cycle: Let bell fall; re‑hinge; shins vertical.
5. Breathing: Exhale on hip drive; inhale on backswing.
6. Avoid: Squatting the swing; over‑extending at top.

name: Kettlebell Clean
instructions:
1. Setup: Bar over mid‑foot; brace; lats on; neutral spine.
2. First Pull: Push floor away to knees; bar close.
3. Second Pull: Extend violently; shrug; pull under.
4. Catch: Rack on shoulders; elbows high; stand tall.
5. Breathing: Brace before pull; exhale after catch.
6. Safety: Learn with light loads; bail safely.

instructions:

Variant: Slow Eccentric. Emphasize control; keep technique identical to base lift.
1. Setup: Bench with feet planted; eyes under bar/weights over mid‑chest; scapulae lightly retracted.
2. Grip: Wrists neutral; forearms vertical at bottom.
3. Lower: Control descent to mid‑chest with elbows ~45° from torso.
4. Press: Drive up and slightly back; wrists stacked over elbows.
5. Breathing: Inhale down, exhale during press.
6. Avoid: Excessive arch, butt lifting, bouncing off chest.
short_instructions:
• Variant: Slow Eccentric. Emphasize control; keep technique identical to base lift
 • Setup: Bench with feet planted; eyes under bar/weights over mid‑chest; scapulae lightly retracted
 • Grip: Wrists neutral; forearms vertical at bottom
